_comment: One-click demo fault reports an operator might type or dictate at the line.

faults.text: Line 3 conveyor is making a loud grinding noise near the drive end and I smell something burning. Belt is still moving but it sounds rough.
Line 3 belt keeps drifting to one side and rubbing the frame. It tracked fine yesterday. No weird noises.
Conveyor on line 3 won't start. The motor hums for a second then the overload trips. Reset it twice, same thing.
Boxes are slipping on the incline and the belt is squealing on startup. Production is backing up at the labeler.
